hooks.command: echo '[hook] Task completed. Consider running /code-review if this completes a feature section.'

slashCommands.name: code-review
slashCommands.description: Code review for current working tree changes (distinct from built-in /review for PRs)
slashCommands.prompt: Invoke the superpowers:requesting-code-review skill. Review the uncommitted changes against the plan or requirements. If there are no uncommitted changes, review the last commit (HEAD~1..HEAD). Report critical/important/minor issues and a merge readiness assessment.
